description: Create an employee survey titled 'Remote Work Readiness 2026' in the Surveys app. The survey must include a multiple-choice question 'What is your primary work location?' (options: Office, Remote, Hybrid) and a multiple-lines text box question 'Please describe your home internet setup.' configured to appear only if the response to the first question is 'Remote' or 'Hybrid'. Additionally, include a matrix question 'Rate your satisfaction with provided tools' with rows for Laptop, VPN Access, and Headset, and columns for Dissatisfied, Neutral, and Satisfied. Login credentials: admin@example.com / admin. Database: odoo_demo.
